entries.content:
Why, at level 1 out of 10, not even the eggshell cracks. A good housewife doesn’t flinch at so slight a disturbance—she clasps her pearls, smiles reassuringly, and asks if anyone would like more tea. And yet, outside this set-dressed sanctuary, the world pulses with pitiful displays of bravado—like those self-engraved swastikas, so much less terrifying than simply being ignored.
